panels.title: feat: shift new signup notification from Slack to Telegram
panels.scene: A group of villagers bowing down to a Telegram bot wearing a crown. A sad, discarded Slack bot sits in a trash can. The knight stands nearby, unimpressed.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The prophecy is true! Telegram has come to save us!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's just a different messaging app. It gets the sign-up alerts now.

panels.title: feat: Telegram alerts for call failures and feedback errors
panels.scene: Villagers celebrating wildly, throwing confetti into the air. A small imp labeled 'Call Failure' cowers in a corner, being chased away by a Telegram bot wielding a rolled-up newspaper.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: No more call failures! Our calls are safe!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Now Telegram will tell us when calls fail.

bubbles.speaker: Call Failure Imp
bubbles.text: Woe is me! I'm being reported!

panels.title: fix: allow Daily.co iframe mic access + add mic check funnel tracking
panels.scene: A villager struggles to speak into a microphone, his face red. The Knight waves his hand, and suddenly the microphone works. Beams of light shine down.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: I can be HEARD! The gods have blessed my voice!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Allowed microphone access in the iframe. And added tracking.

panels.title: 17 commits. 2 fixes. 7 docs. 8 features.
panels.scene: The knight, utterly drained, leans against a stone wall. In the background, villagers are constructing a giant stone Telegram logo.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: A new era of messaging dawns!
